queries.question: Show all the lab equipment and just the safety gear that was purchased in January 2023.
queries.sql:
SELECT Lab_Equipments.equipName as name
FROM Lab_Equipments
UNION
SELECT Safety_Gears.gearName as name
FROM Safety_Gears
WHERE Safety_Gears.dateOfPurchase = "January 2023"

queries.question: Show all items purchased in January 2023 from both lab equipment and safety gear.
queries.sql:
SELECT Lab_Equipments.equipName as name
FROM Lab_Equipments
WHERE Lab_Equipments.dateOfPurchase = "January 2023"
UNION
SELECT Safety_Gears.gearName as name
FROM Safety_Gears
WHERE Safety_Gears.dateOfPurchase = "January 2023"

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show all lab equipment and safety gear that was purchased in January 2023.
